DISCOVERY, 302, PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK'S MOTION TO DEEM MATTERS ADMITTED IS UNOPPOSED AND GRANTED. MOVING PARTY TO SERVE THE WITHIN ORDER WITH NOTICE OF ENTRY ON DEFENDANT. AS TO THE REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS, MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE SUM OF $810.00 ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF TO BE PAID WITHIN TWENTY DAYS OF SERVICE OF SAID ORDER. calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-07-2016 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-07-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day having been assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor; Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840, Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Brandon Tang, Esq. appeared for plaintiff American Express Centurion Bank, a Utah State Chartered Bank.
No appearance by defendant Scottie M. McKinney, an individual.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on November 2, 2015.
Declaration of Mario D. Morales-Aries in lieu of Testimony (CCP Section 98) was served on defendant and filed with the Clerk's Office of January 28, 2016.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, March 7, 2016.
Memorandum of Costs was filed today, March 7, 2016.

The Court takes Judicial Notice of Exhibits 3 & 4 (Motion to Deem Matters Admitted and Notice of Ruling re: Order to Deem Matters Admitted, respectively) submitted by plaintiff in support of request for entry of default.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff American Express Centurion Bank, a Utah State Chartered Bank, and against defendant Scottie M. McKinney, an individual, as follows:

Principal - $10,366.01.
Costs - $495.00.

Total - $10,861.01.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Notice Of Motion To Deem Matters Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-05-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK'S Motion To Deem Matters Admitted is unopposed and granted. Moving party to serve the within Order with Notice of Entry on defendant. As to the request for monetary sanctions, monetary sanctions in the sum of $810.00 are awarded to plaintiff to be paid within twenty days of service of said Order. The moving party shall prepare and submit a proposed order to the Court for signature. Judge Pro Tem: Steven B. Stein, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-02-2015 Set For Trial On Mar-07-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
